description: Native MCP server for the Anthropic Admin API: org, workspaces, members, API keys, usage, costs.
name: io.github.Trushtonfactory/anthropic-admin-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Anthropic Admin API key (Console -> Settings -> Admin Keys). Required.
environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_ADMIN_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional comma-separated workspace IDs to scope write tools to. Recommended for least-privilege setups.
environmentVariables.name: ALLOWED_WORKSPACES

environmentVariables.description: Path for JSONL audit log of mutating operations. Defaults to ./audit.jsonl.
environmentVariables.name: AUDIT_LOG_PATH
